=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
 
Maryland Heights, Missouri
Saturday July 8, 2000
Riverport Amphitheater

CD1 68:00

01. Oh Babe, It Ain't No Lie (acoustic) 
02. To Ramona (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin) 
03. Desolation Row (acoustic) 
04. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) 
05. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
06. Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic - Larry on mandolin)
07. Country Pie 
08. If Not For You 
09. Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 
10. Simple Twist Of Fate 
11. Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 
12. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat 

CD2 25:05

  (encore) 

13. Things Have Changed 
14. Like A Rolling Stone 
15. Forever Young (acoustic) 
16. Highway 61 Revisited 

Audience MD recording > MD(m) > ?unknown transfer? > CDR(x) > EAC (Secure/Offset) > WAV > Audacity > WAV >  FLAC (Level 8) > DIME

MD source was determined using Spectral Analysis w/ Cool Edit Pro ("lego parapet" artifacts are apparent).

I used Audacity to boost the volume by about 8.5 Db. Background talk throughout (can be intrusive at times, d1t10 for example); d1t1@0:21 "whoops, sorry" (male voice); d1t3@):02 "yeah, look at him!" (male voice); d1t3@6:32 "take it home baby" (male voice). Sound is good. This is a different recording to DIME Torrent #108153 based on the CEDAR-type fingerprints.
